content.fact_text: Implementation of the Inventory Resource Controller, providing robust, atomic, and observable stock management endpoints.

provenance_data.behaviour: Exposes RESTful endpoints for inventory management, ensuring transactional integrity via repository locking, cache consistency through cache-aside, and reliable event propagation via Kafka. All operations are non-blocking and production-hardened with circuit breakers and strict input validation.
interfaces: getInventory(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): Promise<void>
reserveStock(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): Promise<void>
adjustStock(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a scalable, resilient, and production-ready interface for stock management within a high-concurrency microservice environment.
